metadata.name: Manage Temporary Files
metadata.description: Configure systemd-tmpfiles to remove unused temporary files and periodically purge files from directories
objectives: Configure systemd-tmpfiles to remove unused temporary files from the /tmp directory
Configure systemd-tmpfiles to periodically purge files from another directory

tasks.name: Verify tmp.conf configuration file exists
tasks.description: The tmp.conf file must be copied to /etc/tmpfiles.d for customization
tasks.failure_message: The tmp.conf configuration file is missing

tasks.name: Verify /tmp cleanup is configured for 5 days
tasks.description: The tmp.conf must configure /tmp cleanup for files unused for 5 days
tasks.success_message: The /tmp directory is configured for 5-day cleanup
tasks.failure_message: The /tmp directory cleanup age is not set to 5 days
hints: The file should contain: q /tmp 1777 root root 5d
Remove all other lines from the file

tasks.name: Verify momentary.conf configuration file exists
tasks.description: The momentary.conf file must exist for /run/momentary directory management
tasks.failure_message: The momentary.conf configuration file is missing

tasks.name: Verify momentary.conf is correctly configured
tasks.description: The momentary.conf must configure /run/momentary with correct permissions and 30-second age
hints: The file should contain: d /run/momentary 0700 root root 30s
d = create directory, 0700 = permissions, root:root = owner:group, 30s = age

tasks.name: Verify /run/momentary directory exists
tasks.description: The /run/momentary directory must be created by systemd-tmpfiles

tasks.name: Verify /run/momentary ownership
tasks.description: The /run/momentary directory must be owned by root:root
hints: The directory should be owned by root:root
